name: Sneak Attack
description: You know how to strike subtly and exploit a foe's distraction, dealing extra damage under certain conditions.

name: Thieves' Cant
description: You know Thieves' Cant, a secret mix of dialect, jargon, and code that allows you to hide messages in seemingly normal conversation.

name: Cunning Action
description: Your quick thinking and agility allow you to take the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action as a bonus action.

name: Roguish Archetype
description: Choose a Roguish Archetype, which grants additional features as you gain Rogue levels.

name: Steady Aim
description: As a bonus action, you can give yourself advantage on your next attack roll this turn, provided you don't move during the turn.

name: Uncanny Dodge
description: When an attacker you can see hits you with an attack, you can use your reaction to halve the attack's damage against you.

name: Reliable Talent
description: Whenever you make an ability check that lets you add your proficiency bonus, you can treat a d20 roll of 9 or lower as a 10.

name: Blindsense
description: If you are able to hear, you are aware of the location of any hidden or invisible creature within range.

name: Slippery Mind
description: You acquire greater mental strength, gaining proficiency in Wisdom saving throws.

name: Elusive
description: You are so evasive that no attack roll has advantage against you while you aren't incapacitated.

name: Stroke of Luck
description: When your attack misses or you fail an ability check, you can turn the miss into a hit or treat the failed check as a 20.
